property.name: displayMode
property.label: Payment Display
property.description: popup = overlay modal (current); inline = renders the payment in the page under the form.

property.name: showViewToggle
property.label: Show Popup/Inline toggle (demo)
property.description: Adds a live Popup/Inline switch on the payment step so you can demo both variants to a customer.

property.name: currencyCode
property.label: Currency (ISO)
property.description: e.g. usd or inr. Payment methods shown come from your Stripe Dashboard for this currency.
